title: No-anchor promoted-combo rank15 p005 gain
pipeline_module: M8 graph resolution + M12 delivery calibration
module_detail: M8 proposes a small subpart reassignment on the current no-anchor global-ID component graph. M12 validates that the production delivery wrapper, density_simple plus p005_area, still improves after detection filtering.
used_in_pipeline: yes: promoted as the current no-anchor best assignment and canonical delivery zip
summary: Balanced reviewer rank15 moves 3 tracklets from source component 27 to target component 10 on top of the current promoted-combo assignment. It gives a tiny but valid canonical gain after fixing p005 @config parsing: IDF1/HOTA/AssA 0.664887/0.525553/0.536870, up from 0.664835/0.525495/0.536810.
implementation: Added @file and b64: config resolution to kit/evaluate_submission_detection_filter.py before _parse_config. The previous p005 validation was rejected because config_name remained a literal @path and dropped_rows was 0. The valid run now reports config_name=p005_area, dropped_rows=7603, rows=1518065. The promoted assignment is local_runs/offline_no_anchor_split_probe_20260623/promoted_combo_subpart_balanced_assignments/rank15_subpart_s27_to10_3seq_assignments.csv.
environment: Python local venv/tooling already used by DS1 scorer
No anchors; GT used only for evaluation/selection
commands:
python - <<'PY'
from kit.evaluate_submission_detection_filter import _resolve_config_text, _parse_config
text, source = _resolve_config_text('@local_runs/offline_no_anchor_split_probe_20260623/p005_area_config.txt')
cfg = _parse_config(text)
assert cfg['name'] == 'p005_area'
assert len(cfg['video_area']) == 10
PY

visual_cases.title: Rank15 false-split island visual case
visual_cases.summary: Three edge/border tracklets were previously kept in component 27 / gid 96000029 and are moved to component 10 / gid 96000011. The case shows sampled bbox positions and the before/after identity assignment.

ablations.name: literal @path p005
ablations.change: old scorer parsed --config @file as a raw string

bitbucket: target branch wisc; commit after artifact generation
s3: blocked locally: aws sts get-caller-identity failed with Unable to locate credentials
next: Treat rank15 as a positive full-score-side-effect label. Search compatible multi-edge combos with larger margin, and keep p005 validation gated on config_name=p005_area plus nonzero expected dropped_rows.
